subject: feat(pdf): add Save as PDF button to both pages
body:
Follows the Download as PDF suggested implementation from CLAUDE.md.
Uses window.print() — zero dependencies, browser's native Save as PDF.
Button in header nav with download icon, hidden during print via
no-print class on the header.

Tags: pdf, portfolio, suggested-implementation
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 1
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: portfolio-site
